buat ketika pemesan di whatsapp melebihi jumlah kamar tersedia maka beri pesan jumlah pemesanan kamar melebihi keter

$resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://balaidiklat.test" -UseBasicParsing -SessionVariable s -TimeoutSec 15; $token = ([regex]::Match($resp.Content, 'csrf-token" content="([^"]+)"')).Groups[1].Value; $headers = @{'X-CSRF-TOKEN'=$token; 'X-Requested-With'='XMLHttpRequest'; 'Accept'='application/json'}; $body = @{nama_pemesan='Test User'; phone_number='628123456789'; tipe_penyewa='perorangan'; tanggal_masuk='2026-07-01'; tanggal_keluar='2026-07-03'; kamar_id=3; jumlah_unit=1; multiple=$false} | ConvertTo-Json; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://balaidiklat.test/kirim-pemesanan-whatsapp" -Method POST -Headers $headers -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json' -WebSession $s -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output "Status: $($r2.StatusCode)"; $json = $r2.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "Success: $($json.success)"; Write-Output "WA URL: $($json.whatsapp_url.Substring(0,80))..." -> pass
